# GitHub Copilot Instructions

## Project Purpose
This is a test project used for validating workflows and automation.  
The code inside this repository is not intended for production use.

## Guidelines for Copilot
- Keep solutions simple and minimal.
- Avoid over-engineering.
- Focus on clarity and readability.
- Do not introduce unnecessary dependencies.

## Testing Code
The following code snippet is used only for testing purposes in CI/CD workflows:

```python
print("Hello World")
```
